verdicts.note: The dossier only names public safety as a priority and supplies no enforcement, prevention, treatment, policing, or accountability mechanism that locates him on the safety axis.

review_notes: Zahn clearly centers public investment and explicitly seeks to stop data centers; his non-government background supports renewal. Abbarno's tax-relief position and state-plus-city elected record support taxes and experience. Generic mention of public safety is insufficient to establish axis direction.
